title: 7 Herbal Tinctures For Bad Breath
description: Zingiber officinale tinctures contains the bioactive constituents gingerol and shogaol. These compounds have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help reduce bad breath by fighting the bacteria that cause it. The antimicrobial properties of gingerol and shogaol also help kill the germs that cause gum disease, a common cause of bad breath. Furthermore, the anti-inflammatory properties of these compounds can help reduce swelling and inflammation in the mouth, making ...
